language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language used by sakiko.

exportPictureMode.label: Export Picture Mode
exportPictureMode.description: Choose whether exported images follow the app theme or always use a fixed light/dark style.

appliedTheme.label: Applied Theme
appliedTheme.systemDescription: The interface follows the current operating system appearance.
appliedTheme.fixedDescription: The interface uses the selected fixed appearance.

taskDefaults.title: Task Defaults
taskDefaults.subtitle: Shared configuration applied when tasks are submitted
taskDefaults.description: Keep launcher tabs focused on task type selection. Adjust shared runtime defaults here instead.
taskDefaults.pingUrlHelper: Used by ping and full tasks
taskDefaults.downloadUrlHelper: Manual override for speed and full tasks
taskDefaults.durationHelper: Used by speed and full tasks. Range: 5-20s

downloadTarget.title: Download Target
downloadTarget.description: Choose a Speedtest target to fill the download URL, or keep the Cloudflare default.
downloadTarget.searchPlaceholder: Search remote Speedtest servers by city or country...
downloadTarget.searchHelper: Search is sent to the Speedtest API. Leave empty to load the default nearby list.
